opis: Monstro is a boss that can appear in the Basement and the Burning Basement.
Larry Jr. is a boss that can appear in the Basement and the Burning Basement.
Chub is a boss that can appear in the Caves and the Flooded Caves.
Gurdy is a boss that can appear in the Caves and the Flooded Caves.
Monstro II is a boss that can appear in the Depths and the Dank Depths.

Mom is the boss that appears on the second floor of Chapter 3 (Depths, Necropolis, Dank Depths). She is the initial final boss of the game, and defeating her for the first time unlocks both the Epilogue ending and Chapter 4 (Womb).
Scolex is a boss that can appear in the Womb and the Scarred Womb.
Mom's Heart is a boss that can appear on the second floor of Chapter 4 (Womb, Utero), and is the final boss of Endings 1-11.
Famine is a Harbinger that can appear in all environments of Chapter 1 (Basement, Cellar, Burning Basement).
Pestilence is a Harbinger that can appear in all environments of Chapter 2 (Caves, Catacombs, Flooded Caves).
War is a Harbinger that can appear in all environments of Chapter 3 (Depths, Necropolis, Dank Depths).
Death occurs when Isaac runs out of health. There are multiple ways to cause this.
Peep is a boss that can appear in all environments of Chapter 2 (Caves, Catacombs, Flooded Caves).
Loki is a boss that can appear in all environments of Chapter 3 (Depths, Necropolis, Dank Depths).
The large Blastocyst has 190 HP / 300 HP, the medium forms have 75 HP, and the small forms have 30 HP.

Each twin has 140 HP. The large twin is called Contusion and the small twin is called Suture.https://www.reddit.com/r/bindingofisaac/comments/8ylum7/hey_guys_its_me_edmund_im_the_guy_that_made_this/e2cbvdf/edmundm:51416553970

Gish is a boss that can appear in the Depths and the Dank Depths.

C.H.A.D. is a boss that can appear in the Caves and the Flooded Caves.
Headless Horseman is a Harbinger that can appear in all environments of Chapters 1, 2, 3, and 4; replacing any other Horsemen.
The Fallen is a boss that can appear on any main path Chapter, with the prerequisite that Isaac has entered (not just encountered) a Devil Room through any methods, and with the following exceptions:

The Hollow is a boss that can appear in the Catacombs.
Gurdy Jr. is a boss that can appear in all environments of Chapter 2 (Caves, Catacombs, Flooded Caves).
The Husk is a boss that can appear in the Catacombs.

The large Teratoma has 60 HP, the medium forms have 15 HP, and the small forms have 8 HP, for a total of 153 HP.
Mask of Infamy is a boss that can appear in Necropolis.
The Wretched is a boss that can appear in the Catacombs.
Pin is a boss that can appear in the Cellar.
Conquest is a Harbinger that can appear in all environments of Chapter 4 (Womb, Utero, Scarred Womb).
Isaac Moriah is the titular main character of The Binding of Isaac, returning from the original 2011 version of the game. Isaac is the only character unlocked by default.

Mega Satan is a boss that appears in Chapter 6 (Chest, Dark Room), and is the final boss of Ending 16.
The Gurglings spawn as a pair and wander around the room. Each individual Gurgling has one attack in total which is performed independently of the other:

Big Horn is a boss added in The Binding of Isaac: Afterbirth † that can appear in all environments of Chapter 2 (Caves, Catacombs, Flooded Caves).
Delirium is a boss added in The Binding of Isaac: Afterbirth †. It is the main boss of The Void and the final boss of Ending 20.

The Pile is a boss added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance that can appear in Necropolis, as well as in the Ashpit in the alternate path.
Reap Creep is a boss added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance that can appear in the Depths and the Dank Depths, as well as in the Mines in the alternate path.
Wormwood is a boss added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance that can appear in Downpour and Dross.
The Rainmaker is a boss added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance that can appear in Downpour.
The Visage is a boss added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance that can appear in Gehenna.
The Siren is a boss added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance that can appear in the Mausoleum.
Tuff Twins is a boss added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance that can appear in the Mines.
The Heretic is a boss added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance that can appear in the Mausoleum.
Hornfel is a boss added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance that can appear in the Mines.
Great Gideon is a boss added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance that can appear in the Mines and the Ashpit.
Baby Plum is a boss added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance that can appear in all environments of Chapter 1 (Basement, Cellar, Burning Basement).
The Scourge is a boss added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance that can appear in the Corpse.
Chimera is a boss added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance that can appear in the Corpse.

Upon entering the boss room in Corpse II, the room is empty except for a hole in its center. Walking into it drops Isaac down into the arena where Mother is fought.
Min-Min is a boss added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance that can appear in Downpour.
Clog is a boss introduced in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance and can appear in Dross.
Singe is a boss added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance that can appear in the Ashpit.
Bumbino is a boss added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance that can appear in all environments of Chapter 2 (Caves, Catacombs, Flooded Caves).
Colostomia is a boss introduced in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance that can appear in Dross.
The Shell is a boss added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance that can appear in the Ashpit.
Turdlet is a boss added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance that can appear in Dross.
Dogma is a boss added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance and is the first boss of Home.
The Beast is a boss added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance DLC. She appears in Home and is the final boss of Ending 22, as well as The Binding of Isaac as a whole.
Clutch is a boss added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance (update v1.7.8) that appears in the Ashpit.
